name: Connect6
author: AGP
description: Connect6 (Professor I-Chen Wu, 2005). A fair six-in-a-row on a Go-style grid: Black plays a single stone on the very first move, then each turn (both players) places TWO stones. The first to make an unbroken line of six or more of their own stones — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal — wins. The two-stones-per-turn rule balances the game. Choose a 13x13 or 19x19 board.
